# Olympia Treasury — Protocol-Controlled Vault for Ethereum Classic

## About

The Olympia Treasury (ECIP-1112) is an immutable, protocol-controlled vault that receives EIP-1559 basefee revenue and disburses funds through on-chain governance. It is non-inflationary — no new ETC coins are minted. All funds come from existing transaction fees.

## Key Features

- Protocol-level basefee accumulation (EIP-1559)
- On-chain governance-controlled disbursement
- AccessControlDefaultAdminRules security model (OpenZeppelin 5.6)
- Timelock-protected execution
- Fully auditable and transparent

## Contract

- Address: 0xd6165F3aF4281037bce810621F62B43077Fb0e37
- Network: Mordor Testnet (Chain ID 63) + ETC Mainnet
- Version: Demo v0.1

## Fund Allocation

- Developer Retention
- Infrastructure Maintenance
- Emergency Response
- Public Goods

## Authors

- Cody Burns (github.com/realcodywburns)
